# protocol.vaked.dev

> AG-UI Open Protocol — the canonical reference for the UI↔AI surface standard.

The open standard for how AI agents communicate with user interfaces. Defines the event stream (wire protocol) and surface (visual implementation). Upstream-compatible; Vaked extensions marked separately.

## Protocol spec

- [AG-UI Wire Protocol](https://protocol.vaked.dev): Full spec — RUN_STARTED, TEXT_MESSAGE_*, TOOL_CALL_*, STEP_*, STATE_SNAPSHOT, CUSTOM
- [Vaked extensions](https://protocol.vaked.dev/#vaked-extensions): OBLITERATUS, SACRED surface, genesis seal

## Vaked ecosystem

- [chat.vaked.dev](https://chat.vaked.dev): G0DM0D3 — free-model AI chat proxy, AG-UI compliant
- [music.vaked.dev](https://music.vaked.dev): ENTHEA — psychedelic visual synthesizer
- [beat.vaked.dev](https://beat.vaked.dev): Vaked-FM swarm avatar
- [irc.vaked.dev](https://irc.vaked.dev): public IRC community (Ergo + Gamja)
- [pocoo.vaked.dev](https://pocoo.vaked.dev): personal technical blog — agentic systems, compilers, loops
- [pocoo.vaked.dev/feed.xml](https://pocoo.vaked.dev/feed.xml): Atom feed

## Dataset

- [PeetPedro/ultrawhale-dogfood](https://huggingface.co/datasets/PeetPedro/ultrawhale-dogfood): live dataset — dogfeed loop output + vaked site telemetry

- GitHub: https://github.com/peterlodri-sec
- X: https://x.com/0xp3t3rl
- Mastodon: https://social.crabcc.app/@vakedbot
- Blog: https://pocoo.vaked.dev
